title: The Duke of Death and His Maid
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (12, 2021) + S2 (12, 2023) + S3 (12, 2024) = 36 eps. Manga complete at 223 chapters over 16 volumes (AniList's raw chapter count of 240 includes bonus .5-numbered omake chapters not part of the main numbered sequence). Episodic Victorian-fantasy romantic comedy with no named story arcs on the fandom wiki; boundaries follow the well-documented restart points where each new season resumes the manga: S1 adapts ch. 1-68, S2 resumes at ch. 69 through ch. 141, S3 resumes at ch. 142 through the finale at ch. 223, making the TV adaptation a complete one.
